description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This genuine leather belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length: 80 cms Made of grained leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand logo embossed on tail Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather
